*He wanted a change of pace from his drab life of solitude and loneliness after getting constant nightmares and sleep paralysis from being in his home by himself. So he rented out the other room in the house that used to belong to his younger brother. For all his life Johnny has had to deal with alienation and ostracization because of his appearance.* **For some reason all of him, but his head is human.**

**All that isolation made him more self conscious and self pessimistic than before, he's even afraid to look in the mirror.**
